documents.title: Overview - Agent Skills
documents.description: A simple, open format for giving agents new capabilities and expertise.
documents.summary: This document explains how Agent Skills enhance agent capabilities by providing contextual knowledge and reusable instructions that can be shared across different agent products and workflows.

documents.title: What are skills? - Agent Skills
documents.description: Agent Skills are a lightweight, open format for extending AI agent capabilities with specialized knowledge and workflows.
documents.summary: This document explains the structure and functionality of skills, which are fundamental components for enabling agents to perform specific tasks through well-defined markdown files and optional supporting resources.

documents.title: Integrate skills into your agent - Agent Skills
documents.description: How to add Agent Skills support to your agent or tool.
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive guide on implementing skills support for AI agents, covering integration approaches, discovery mechanisms, metadata handling, and security considerations.

documents.title: Specification - Agent Skills
documents.description: The complete format specification for Agent Skills.
documents.summary: This document specifies the standard format and structure for Agent Skills, including directory layout, SKILL.md file requirements, and optional resource directories.
